title: axi.latency_outlier request

direction.description: Action-specific direction input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

line_limit.description: Limits returned evidence rows only, not scanning, aggregation, or the verdict; read completeness fields as well.

method.description: Action-specific method input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

include_data.description: Action-specific include_data input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

output.description: Export destination and rendering controls. path, file_format, and verbose are supported only where this action declares them.

threshold.description: Action-specific threshold input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

begin.description: Action-specific begin input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

end.description: Action-specific end input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

time_range.description: Closed analysis interval. begin and end may be omitted independently to use the available waveform bounds.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

top_n.description: Action-specific top_n input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

description: Find AXI transactions with abnormal latency.
x-purpose: 实验性 AXI latency 异常。
x-how_it_works: 从配对结果中找超过阈值或分布异常的事务。
x-description-zh: 实验性 AXI latency 异常。

use_when: 实验性 AXI latency 异常。
do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 axi.analysis、axi.export 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。
